institution.name: Southern West Virginia Community and Technical College

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Southern West Virginia Community and Technical College rose 53% between 2017 and 2020 ($6.0k → $9.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southern West Virginia Community and Technical College rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.1k → $5.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southern West Virginia Community and Technical College rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.5k → $7.9k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Southern West Virginia Community and Technical College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2k → 1.1k).
